fields.title: Migrate registry and skills to agent module
fields.description:
Move TaskRegistry and skill loading from task/ to agent/ with minimal changes.

## Deliverables
- src/agent/registry.ts (from task/registry.ts)
- src/agent/skills.ts (from task/skills.ts)

## Changes
- Update import paths
- Keep all existing functionality
- Registry resolves type + complexity → ResolvedPolicy

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] TaskRegistry.load() works unchanged
- [ ] TaskRegistry.resolve(type, complexity) returns ResolvedPolicy
- [ ] loadSkills() finds skills from all paths (project, user, extension)
- [ ] Builtin task types preserved (code, search, review, planning, advisor, refactor, bash, custom)
- [ ] User config overrides work
- [ ] Complexity routing works (low/medium/high → different models)
- [ ] No breaking changes to registry API
fields.close_reason: Implemented and migrated non-blocking agent system
